title: hiding or collapsing items and sub-items
excerpt:
hi, it would be really useful if we could “hide” or “collapse” an item or subitem that we don’t want to delete, but don’t want to see it for the time being. 
btw: also “archiving” an item or subitem would be great, the p…

posts.author: Taigo (Itai Golan)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi, it would be really useful if we could “hide” or “collapse” an item or subitem that we don’t want to delete, but don’t want to see it for the time being.
btw: also “archiving” an item or subitem would be great, the problem is that when i try to find an archived item, i have to define the dates, and if it’s an item that was archived a year ago- how can one remember the date!? thanks
